URL: https://github.com/2dust/v2rayN
Language: c%23
A GUI client for Windows, Linux and macOS, support Xray and sing-box and others

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Aether-Tools/CustomizePlus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Aether-Tools/CustomizePlus
Language: c%23
Dalamud plugin designed to give you better control over your Final Fantasy XIV character appearance.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
Language: c%23
Unity MCP acts as a bridge, allowing AI assistants (like Claude, Cursor) to interact directly with your Unity Editor via a local MCP (Model Context Protocol) Client. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DevToys-app/DevToys
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DevToys-app/DevToys
Language: c%23
A Swiss Army knife for developers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Devolutions/UniGetUI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Devolutions/UniGetUI
Language: c%23
UniGetUI: The Graphical Interface for your package managers. Could be terribly described as a package manager manager to manage your package managers

URL: https://github.com/LorisYounger/VPet
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ShareX/ShareX
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ShareX/ShareX
Language: c%23
ShareX is a free and open-source application that enables users to capture or record any area of their screen with a single keystroke. It also supports uploading images, text, and various file types to a wide range of destinations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Sonarr/Sonarr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Sonarr/Sonarr
Language: c%23
Smart PVR for newsgroup and bittorrent users.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SubtitleEdit/subtitleedit
Language: c%23
the subtitle editor :)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: abpframework/abp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/abpframework/abp
Language: c%23
Open-source web application framework for ASP.NET Core! Offers an opinionated architecture to build enterprise software solutions with best practices on top of the .NET. Provides the fundamental infrastructure, cross-cutting-concern implementations, startup templates, application modules, UI themes, tooling and documentation.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/aspnetcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/skills
Language: c%23
Repository for skills to assist AI coding agents with .NET and C#

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mob-sakai/ParticleEffectForUGUI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
